display_text: Vengeful Spirit Aghanim's Scepter: Vengeance Aura — Creates a strong illusion upon death that can cast spells and deals full damage. This upgrade counters death-timing punishes by maintaining teamfight presence and XP retention, effectively turning Vengeful Spirit into a persistent threat even after death.
search_text: Vengeful Spirit Aghanim Scepter anti-death-timing persistent threat illusion XP retention

display_text: Vengeful Spirit Aghanim's Shard: Magic Missile — Adds a bounce to Magic Missile, prioritizing heroes. This upgrade counters grouped enemy formations by increasing crowd control potential, transforming Vengeful Spirit into a more reliable initiator or follow-up disabler in chaotic fights.
search_text: Vengeful Spirit Aghanim Shard anti-grouped-enemies crowd control initiation
